_meta.note: Manual transcription pass. Only labelled cells from the chart go here — plain unmarked portraits (implicit-immune) are already covered by MCOCHUB kit text via the abilityText source. Chart is used only as an INDEPENDENT second source to promote abilityText-only single-source flags into lock-2src. Freshness: chart is stale-suspect for champs released after June 2026 (task #80 tracks this).
_meta.format: champions[seedId][EffectName] = { band, qual?, partner? }. Bands: immune | resist (qual = 'N%') | mechanic (qual = 'Purify' | 'Duration') | synergy (partner = 'Display Name'). See data/champions/immunities-fixture.json for shape examples.
